'''Trandia''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] with blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and long strawberry-blond hair. She was [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine's]] most capable female [[Commando/Legends|commando]]. She [[Death/Legends|killed]] herself by detonating her explosives onboard the [[Darksaber (superweapon)|Darksaber]] after being cornered by guards.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
